name: COINFLATE!!
short_description: To all balance breakers. A roguelike of destruction and freedom that exploits gaps in the system to generate coins. Start a ruinous economy with a cute cat.
detailed_description:
A roguelite money game where you score, earn and earn more by placing coins into gates.

Play efficiently, placing objects freely and enhancing your production capacity to score quickly and massively within a time limit.

The choice of upgrades is entirely up to you.Increase the size of the coin gates, get rich with devices that explode with coins, or collapse the balance and keep up with inflation.

Cat characters with different abilities are also available, adding a little comfort to the chaotic money-making process.

Go broke or fill the world with coins - it's all in your hands.
